Variables.Name: NodePosX
Variables.Description: X position of node in the editor

Variables.Name: NodePosY
Variables.Description: Y position of node in the editor

Variables.Name: NodeWidth
Variables.Description: Width of node in the editor; only used when the node can be resized

Variables.Name: NodeHeight
Variables.Description: Height of node in the editor; only used when the node can be resized

Variables.Name: AdvancedPinDisplay
Variables.Description: Enum to indicate if a node has advanced-display-pins, and if they are shown

Variables.Name: EnabledState
Variables.Description: Indicates in what state the node is enabled, which may eliminate it from being compiled

Variables.Name: bUserSetEnabledState
Variables.Description: Indicates whether or not the user explicitly set the enabled state

Variables.Name: bIsNodeEnabled_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: (DEPRECATED) FALSE if the node is a disabled, which eliminates it from being compiled

Variables.Name: bHasCompilerMessage
Variables.Description: Flag to check for compile errorwarning

Variables.Name: NodeComment
Variables.Description: Comment string that is drawn on the node

Variables.Name: ReferenceObjCategory
Variables.Description: ReferenceObjCategory that is drawn on the node

Variables.Name: ErrorType
Variables.Description: Flag to store node specific compile errorwarning

Variables.Name: NodeGuid
Variables.Description: GUID to uniquely identify this node, to facilitate diffing versions of this graph
